ads.title: Valley Cougar Darts Arcade Machine 1986
ads.description: Dimensions are 1’x2’x8’ Vintage arcade dart machine is manufactured by Valley Recreation Products, Inc. This upright cabinet has a black and white color scheme with blue and red accents on the dartboard. The unit is constructed from wood and metal with a coin-operated mechanism and multiple locking access panels. It has a digital score display at the top and a soft-tip dartboard.
